calendar.matters:
Petition Pursuant To Probate Code 17200 To Determine The Lost Or Destroyed Trust
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Ward for Princess Green

Mr. Ward stated that he has a fully executed verification but that he is not sure if it has been filed. Mr. Ward also stated that Bryant Lovett refused to decline and refuses to sign anything. The Court noted that no other Party was present. The Court granted the Petition to Determine the Lost or Destroyed Trust Unprovable, etc. (subject to review of the order and filing of a completed verification).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
